title: The AI for Social Good Design Framework
description: A cyclical flowchart outlining the key iterative phases for designing AI systems that prioritize ethical outcomes and societal benefit.
relationships: The process begins by defining a clear objective, which informs continuous engagement with stakeholders. Their input guides the integration of ethical principles into the technical development. The deployed system's impact is then assessed, and the results feed back into redefining the objective and improving the system in an ongoing cycle.
